Document:
# Conflict Rule 2 ## Adhere to the new life rule.
[color=yellow][bold]After death, your memory and behavior depend on how you return:[/bold][/color] - [color=green][bold]Revival (defib, medical intervention):[/bold][/color] You regain full memory of your previous life, but details about who killed you, how, and with what should remain vague or obscure. You may remember some general aspects, but not specific names, vessels, or clear identifying information. - [color=yellow][bold]Cloned (medical cloner):[/bold][/color] Forget the last 15 minutes before death (events, engagement, people involved). Do not act on information from that period. - [color=red][bold]Respawn:[/bold][/color] Forget the last 30 minutes before death. Do not seek revenge, keep grudges, act on information related to your death or the last 30 minutes. Do not start unprovoked combat with player, crew or group that caused Your character death within 1 hour from respawning. You may remember earlier events, but may not return for your previous life’s items. You should also avoid returning to the location of your death during an ongoing situation (such as a battle or standoff). -- Ghostrole Antagonists (Chimera, ADM/ADC, Asakim, Borers, etc.,) are generally exempt from the above unless clear abuse is showcased. - [color=yellow][bold]You may not respawn as the same character on an opposing faction.[/bold][/color]
